headline: The Toughest Questions PAYX Faced On Its Latest Call
summary: Paychex is telling a story of accelerating growth, but on its latest earnings call, analysts tested whether that growth is built to last or just clever acquisition math.

headline: The Done-For-You Silence That Reshapes The Intuit Stock Growth Story
summary: Management now champions a new portfolio of 'growth engines,' but the story they quietly shelved was powered by a flagship product whose once-explosive growth has started to cool.

raw.headline: The Done-For-You Silence That Reshapes The Intuit Stock Growth Story

headline: ADP Research to Launch Monthly Pay Measure in Canada to Track Wage Growth
summary: ADP Research, the data-driven research arm of ADP, Inc. will launch a new monthly labour market report in Canada with the release of ADP Canada Pay Insights set to publish on September 3, 2026 at 8:15am ET. This new, recurring data series will serve as an independent labour market indicator to provide a robust, measure of pay growth trends for job-stayers and job-changers across the Canadian private-sector labour market.
